channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Piles of organic waste and litter. Nearly swept up but waiting fir over 3 days to be picked up, 17th April
item.description:
Now scattering around the streets and Glebe estate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dagmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass not being cut, 17th April
item.description:
There is a grass section at the end of Berwick crescent and fen grove which has not been cut for a few months now. The last two occasions when both roads have had the grass cut this section of grass has been missed and is getting very long and overgrown and now contains litter. It needs to be cut.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Berwick Crescent, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot large holes and deep cracks on Manor Drive, 17th April
item.description:
Multiple pot large holes on top , deep cracks in the road from previous patch repairs from top end of Manor Drive @no 15 towards the Church @no 32. A high volume of traffic road causing further damage, resulting in car tyre damage to cost to residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Drive, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Sofas, 1 easy chair, and 6 chairs, 17th April
item.description:
The above items have been deposited on the Palatine Road pavement outside the premises known as PUBB, located at 97 Stoke Newington Road, N16 8BX. The flytipped items are believed to have come from inside these premises.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of clothes dumped on street by bins, 17th April
item.description:
Noticed lots of waste clothes flytipped in bags on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langton Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole sofa recently dumped, 17th April
item.description:
People fly too on this street because there’s no CCTV and few people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cormont Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bag of builders rubble dumped outside 59 Hillcourt Road SE22 0PF, 17th April
item.description:
Large bag of builders rubble dumped outside 59 Hillcourt Road SE22 0PF
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcourt Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leftover tarmac from recent road works, 17th April
item.description:
There is some left over tarmac following recent road repairs, this is mainly on the junction of Holbrook Way and Southborough Lane, on the pavement and paths. You’ll see that the path outside the church has tarmac as well. The resurfacing took place from 13 April, so there maybe other tarmac debris along the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another vehicle dumped with no tax by a resident in road, 17th April
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmcroft Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 17th April
item.description:
Dog poo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Napoleon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter is weak, moving, whole construction, 17th April
item.description:
Need to be fixed on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Rodney Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter is weak, moving, whole construction, 17th April
item.description:
Need to be fixed on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Rodney Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping by resident, 17th April
item.description:
Over flowing rubbish bins and rubbish on ground. Put out the day after rubbish was collected last Friday..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pile of rubbish and an uncleared alleyway, 17th April
item.description:
This has been there for some months now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frinsted Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere on Kidbrooke green park, 17th April
item.description:
I just moved to the area and I am disgusted how dirty it is. I take the path on Greenwich green park to go to Kidbrooke station and there is litter everywhere. Looks like it has never been cleaned. Some are there since I moved in, in October. Really shame cause the park could be really nice but it looks so bad I am even afraid to cross it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thyme Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th April
item.description:
Reported fly tipping earlier this week. The majority was removed but this sofa, a carpet and some other household items were left behind. Please can we get these removed too,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendas Mead, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double mattress abandoned on street outside my home, 17th April
item.description:
This mattress was just abandoned outside my home and blocking access to my bins. I saw someone emerge from a neighbouring property and abandon it here, though I did not see their faces.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colby Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken barrier, 17th April
item.description:
Broken barrier - risk of someone falling into vegetation/water, potentially steep embankment. Needs repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous box junction, 17th April
item.description:
Hi, this box junction has new cameras installed and it’s making the junction dangerous. I was crossing the road on the zebra crossing this morning and a mini shot towards me at speed and then stopped and I realised the driver drove erratically because he was terrified of someone blocking him and getting caught in the box. To be a pedestrian and have to suffer this because of the councils desire to issue penalty tickets or fines to car drivers just isn’t on. I’m not easily worried so the fact that this alarmed me certainly got me thinking of others who could have been terrified. There is a noted hesitancy and nervousness in the car drivers attitude when negotiating this obstacle of a box junction located right on top of a zebra crossing and it needs to be addressed before someone gets hurt. I live off Lawrie park road and also drive a car and would add that the box junction enforcement has not improved traffic flow either in fact it’s just a money grabbing obstacle that is making drivers behave erratically
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The parking signs been getting spray painted, 17th April
item.description:
Random cars are parking that done live in the estate , there are people coming handing around in their cars tha done live there , Come fix the signs , use the cameras to punish who ever is spraying the signs !!!!!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warmington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
